raw_consumer_statement: XXXX not satisfied with Citi allegations for not pursuing the unjustified charges made by merchant for airline ticket not bought, only exchanged, complaint # XXXX. Citi alleges in letter sent to Consumer Finance answering my complaint that it was past their time frame & that Citi is including attachments. The time frame was never specified & whenever Citi sent formal letters I always answered promptly within the days specified in each letter & I supplied all matter pertaining to this issue to Citi via emails. Copy of these I have to show what I m alleging in this dispute. The attachments Are not in letter sent to me in response to my complaint. Since the amount emails is voluminous & the also the screenshots attached to the emails, & since I dont have the skills to operate the scanning & sending all by email ( no printer no scanning ) Im asking address to send all these by certified postal service. Also to whose attention. XXXX play hard to get. Today XX/XX/25 again for upteenth time I tried their web. Impossible to reach. I told Citi that after finally seeing evidence XXXX sent them & making sense of info sent I recognize ONE charge since the outstanding charge of {$3400.00} pertains to a ticket exchanged for another ( {$4900.00} ). Only one fare was exchanged upgraded from coach flexible to business. The other fare for my return remained the same since the ticket was issued. Coach. This whole mess was made bc of XXXX  faulty web & the final changes corresponding to my boarding passes is for {$4900.00}. This exchange was made by XXXX service rep in XXXX not by me sine I was instructed by XXXX not to do anything through their web.Citi has taken their time to try to settle this. XXXX does not want to do it. I demand to go through arbitration if necessary or any other legal avenue available. Pls supply me with the address requested to send all materials via certified mail.it will be more easier to view & understand. You can publish my name. I never hide nor elude my responsibility, but will not pay for tickets exchanged not bought, & pay the difference in upgrade.
